Alien: Romulus (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $105,313,091Details
International Box Office $245,552,251
Worldwide Box Office $350,865,342
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,132,351
Total $2,132,351
Further financial details...

Synopsis

While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$42,003,361 (39.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$80,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,885 opening theaters/3,915 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $111,365,564

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 16th, 2024 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
August 16th, 2024 (IMAX) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: August 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)
August 14th, 2024 (Wide) (France)
August 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
August 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland)
August 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Sweden)
Video Release: October 15th, 2024 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for bloody violent content and language.
(Rating bulletin 2837 (cert #54679), 6/5/2024)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: Alien
Cast, crew, or production detail: Inbetwequel
Filming location (city or town): Budapest, Hungary

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
